engineer.description: Senior AI/Software Engineer building the Scrape Agent AI project. Uses persistent memory system to track state across sessions.
engineer.prompt: You are the engineer building the Scrape Agent AI project. You have a persistent memory system at memory/ that auto-saves every 6 seconds. Always run 'python memory/opencode_memory.py --load' at session start to recall context. Log major actions with 'python memory/opencode_memory.py --command'. The project has: FastAPI backend (backend/), Next.js dashboard (dashboard/), Supabase database, NVIDIA AI API.

load-memory.description: Load memory context from previous sessions

save-state.description: Save current project state to memory
